description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring three upright, segmented green bamboo stalks emerging from a round, beige plastic pot. The bamboo stalks are of varying heights and thicknesses, with several narrow, pointed green leaves sprouting from the nodes and upper sections. The pot is filled with a granular, soil-like substrate that appears to be small pebbles or coarse dirt. The pot itself has a simple, slightly faceted design with a dark horizontal band near its upper third, giving it a utilitarian appearance. The bamboo stalks have a realistic texture, with visible segment lines and subtle color variations. There are no visible decorative elements or plant identification tags attached to the pot or plant.
description: A beige plastic pot holds three upright green bamboo stalks with pointed leaves and a granular soil substrate. The pot is plain with a dark band and no visible decorations or labels.
description_view_0: Three bamboo stalks of varying heights are visible, with several leaves and the pot's dark band clearly seen.
description_view_1: The bamboo stalks are aligned, with the tallest stalk in the center and more leaves visible on the right side.
description_view_2: The central bamboo stalk is most prominent, with fewer leaves visible and the pot's band in clear view.
description_view_3: The bamboo stalks overlap more, with the tallest stalk at the back and leaves mostly on the left side.
